justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and offered to check other times or days, but did not proactively offer a range of alternative slots until the very end of the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for availability for the same topic and contact medium in every turn, even when those details remained unchanged.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer expressed frustration multiple times due to the agent's inability to find an appointment and its repetitive responses, leading to a tiring and disappointing experience.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context regarding the topic and contact medium but struggled to proactively suggest available slots, leading to a prolonged and repetitive search for appointments.

overall_notes: The agent successfully booked an appointment in the end, but the process was highly inefficient and frustrating for the user due to the agent's inability to proactively offer available slots and its repetitive responses to unavailability.
